narrative: npm led with 76% of weekly downloads. Top package: @ai-rpg-engine/modules (133 this week). Top gainer: @ai-rpg-engine/asset-registry (+313%; Δ47). Concentration: top 5 = 18.3%. Data is partial (degraded: npm) (48 packages used cached previous data).

narrativeLines.label: Registry Lead
narrativeLines.text: npm led with 76% of 3,209 weekly downloads followed by PyPI (24%).

narrativeLines.label: Concentration
narrativeLines.text: Top 5 packages account for 18.3% of weekly downloads. Downloads are well-distributed across the portfolio.

narrativeLines.label: Data Health
narrativeLines.text: Data is partial (degraded: npm) (48 packages used cached previous data).

recommendations.title: 17 packages losing momentum
recommendations.detail: @ai-rpg-engine/modules, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-cyberpunk, @ai-rpg-engine/character-profile and 14 more show sustained decline. Consider: release updates, fix open issues, or update documentation.

recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.75 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: Heavy npm dependency
recommendations.detail: 76% of downloads come from npm. Consider cross-publishing to PyPI and NuGet to reduce single-registry risk.

recommendations.title: 1 package gaining traction
recommendations.detail: @ai-rpg-engine/asset-registry show organic growth with download spikes. Capitalize with blog posts, social media, or conference talks.

recommendations.title: 2 packages predicted to grow
recommendations.detail: Statistical models predict >20% growth in the next 7 days for @ai-rpg-engine/presentation, @ai-rpg-engine/image-gen.

recommendations.title: 14 packages with repeated spikes
recommendations.detail: Multiple download spikes detected for @ai-rpg-engine/modules, @ai-rpg-engine/core, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-weird-west. Could indicate bot activity, viral posts, or dependency adoption.

actionableAdvice.title: 76 packages in critical health
actionableAdvice.detail: backpropagate, mcpt, polyglot-gpu, comfy-headless, tool-compass scored below 20/100.
actionableAdvice.action: Review these packages for broken installs, outdated dependencies, or missing documentation. Consider archiving if no longer maintained.

actionableAdvice.title: 4 packages in rapid decline
actionableAdvice.action: Check for competing packages, broken releases, or ecosystem changes. Push a patch release or announcement.

actionableAdvice.title: Portfolio concentration risk
actionableAdvice.detail: Gini coefficient 0.75 — downloads are concentrated in a few packages.
actionableAdvice.action: Promote underperforming packages in README badges, blog posts, and release notes of popular packages.

actionableAdvice.title: 76% of traffic from npm
actionableAdvice.detail: Single-registry dependency increases blast radius if npm has outages or policy changes.
actionableAdvice.action: Cross-publish key packages to PyPI (via wrapper) or NuGet. Add install instructions for all registries in READMEs.

actionableAdvice.title: 15 packages with untapped potential
actionableAdvice.detail: @ai-rpg-engine/modules, @ai-rpg-engine/character-profile, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-pirate have active users but stalled growth.
actionableAdvice.action: Add new features, improve docs, or create tutorials. Small efforts can shift these from D to C+ quickly.
